assumptions.pilot_note: P1-P6 has only six CR/Non-CR pairs; effects are descriptive and not used as the sole recruitment basis.

planning_recommendation.probe_or_combined_participant_study: A simple paired contrast at dz=0.5 requires 34 complete participants (recruit 40 with 15% loss). Because the planned study includes interactions and mixed-effects analyses, target 40 complete and recruit 47 if resources allow.
planning_recommendation.six_nasa_dimensions_as_equal_primary_tes: Use the conservative corrected table; approximately 60 complete participants may be needed for dz near 0.5. Prefer one primary dimension/contrast and treat others as secondary.
planning_recommendation.researcher_review: Target 30 complete researchers with 6 cases per interface condition only if a 15-percentage-point accuracy improvement (0.65 to 0.80) is the smallest effect of interest. A 10-point improvement needs about 66-72 complete researchers under these assumptions. Run an internal 6-8 researcher pilot and update the simulation.
